allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add full D&D 3rd Edition character card support

Implemented comprehensive D&D 3e character management system with:

Database Models:
- CharacterDnD3e main model with all attributes, saving throws, combat stats
- DnD3eSkills for 40+ skills with class skills and ranks
- DnD3eAbilities for racial, class, and feat abilities
- DnD3eEquipment for inventory \(40 slots\)
- DnD3eMagic and DnD3eSpell for spellcasting system \(levels 0-9\)

Backend Routes:
- POST /nowa-karta-dnd3e - Create new character
- GET/POST /edytuj-karte-dnd3e/<id> - Edit character
- POST /usun-karte-dnd3e/<id> - Delete character
- Updated /karty-postaci to display D&D 3e characters

Frontend Templates:
- nowa_karta_dnd3e.html - Character creation form
- edytuj_karte_dnd3e.html - Character editing form
- Updated karty_postaci.html with D&D 3e section
- Updated wybierz_system.html with D&D 3e option

Features:
- 6 attributes with temporary modifiers \(STR, DEX, CON, INT, WIS, CHA\)
- 3 saving throws \(Fortitude, Reflex, Will\) with full breakdown
- Hit points, armor class, base attack bonus, initiative
- 3 weapon slots with full stats
- Armor and shield with penalties
- Money \(PP, GP, SP, CP\) and experience tracking
- Notes and campaign field

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(git commit -m 'Fix D&D 3e form z-index - ensure forms appear above background image *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Fix D&D 3e z-index with !important to override conflicting styles *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Fix D&D 3e z-index - force background layers with inline !important styles *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Fix D&D 3e styling to match D&D 5e structure \(colors only changed\) *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Add checkbox persistence for Cthulhu skills with clear functionality *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Fix Cthulhu skills - add error handling for missing checked_skills field *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Auto-initialize checked_skills field for old Cthulhu skill records *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Replace hasattr\(\) with getattr\(\) for checked_skills SQLAlchemy attribute *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Add automatic database migration for checked_skills column *)
